data.content: Implemented immediate, colored progress feedback for kno push/pull/sync via a shared reporter threaded through replication and sync internals. JSON output stays clean. Added CLI/UI coverage for progress output and fixed a time-sensitive invariant sync test by setting hot_window_days in the test. Verification: make sanity passed at 95.30% coverage. Branch: knots-78d5-push-pull-feedback. Commit: cf7eb28d7cb7. PR: https://github.com/acartine/knots/pull/27
